component.description: 200mA, Low IQ, Low Noise, Low Dropout Linear Regulator

electrical_characteristics.conditions: VOUT >= 0.85 V
0 mA <= IOUT <= 150 mA

2.8 V < VOUT <= 3.3 V, IOUT = 150 mA, VIN = 0.98 x VOUT(nom)

pin_definitions.description: Regulated output voltage pin. A small 1-μF ceramic capacitor is required from this pin to ground to assure stability.

Enable pin. Driving EN over 0.9 V turns on the regulator. Driving EN below 0.4 V puts the regulator into shutdown mode. For TLV707P, output voltage is discharged through an internal 120-Ω resistor when device is shut down.
Input pin. For good transient performance, place a small 1-μF ceramic capacitor from this pin to ground.

logical_pins.name: OUT
logical_pins.description: Regulated output voltage pin. A small 1-µF ceramic capacitor is required from this pin to ground to assure stability.

logical_pins.name: EN
logical_pins.description: Enable pin. Driving EN over 0.9 V turns on the regulator. Driving EN below 0.4 V puts the regulator into shutdown mode. For TLV707P, output voltage is discharged through an internal 120-Ω resistor when device is shut down.

logical_pins.name: IN
logical_pins.description: Input pin. For good transient performance, place a small 1-µF ceramic capacitor from this pin to ground.
